extraction.one_line_summary: BOASSON HAGEN won from a reduced sprint after LAMBRECHT joined a late breakaway that nearly survived, caught inside final 1500m.
tactical_patterns: ALAPHILIPPE accelerated at 20km with KWIATKOWSKI, racing for stage not protecting HODEG sprinter, fracturing peloton significantly.
LAMBRECHT attacking from breakaway on final climbs provided enough tempo variance to shed pure sprinters before late catch.
DIMENSION DATA timed sprint commitment perfectly in reduced group where BOASSON HAGEN's short-distance kick beats classics specialists.
Teams with pure sprinters BENNETT and GREIPEL eliminated by repeated accelerations mid-stage rather than final climb selection.

rider_signals.BOASSON HAGEN Edvald: positive: delivered elite short-distance kick in reduced sprint, suggesting classics-terrain punch intact for hillier stages
rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: positive: drove race-splitting acceleration 20km out, confirming aggression carries from classics into stage races
rider_signals.LAMBRECHT Bjorg: positive: solo accelerations from breakaway on climbs nearly held off peloton, exceptional climbing for young rider
rider_signals.GILBERT Philippe: neutral: positioned well for reduced sprint but lacked final kick to challenge BOASSON HAGEN
rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: neutral: present in reduced group and attempted late positioning, survived selection but no sprint finish
rider_signals.HODEG Álvaro José: negative: DECEUNINCK abandoned sprint support for HODEG when ALAPHILIPPE accelerated, suggesting unsuitability for lumpy terrain
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: eliminated before finale by mid-stage accelerations, confirming vulnerability on undulating parcours
rider_signals.KWIATKOWSKI Michał: positive: followed ALAPHILIPPE's 20km acceleration immediately, showing INEOS willing to race aggressively early
rider_signals.VERMOTE Julien: negative: dropped from early breakaway despite breakaway specialist pedigree, form concerns evident
rider_signals.EDET Nicolas: negative: tested accelerations early but dropped before decisive phase, lacking form to influence selection
